name: SwarmUI
description: SwarmUI is a powerful Stable Diffusion WebUI with built-in ComfyUI integration for AI image generation. It provides a modern web interface for generating images using various AI models.

notes.text: GPU passthrough must be enabled in Proxmox container configuration for image generation.
For NVIDIA GPUs, ensure nvidia-container-toolkit is installed on the Proxmox host.
For AMD GPUs, ensure ROCm drivers are installed on the Proxmox host.
First run will download default AI models (~5GB). Additional models can be added to /opt/swarmui/Models
